name: Myutant Expansion
name_jp: ミュートリア<ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>個</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>体</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>系</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When you activate this card: You can take 1 Level 4 or lower "Myutant" monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand or Special Summon it. If a Level 8 or higher "Myutant" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card you control instead. You can only activate 1 "Myutant Expansion" per turn.
eff: When you activate this card: You can take 1 Level 4 or lower "Myutant" monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand or Special Summon it. If a Level 8 or higher "Myutant" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card you control instead. You can only activate 1 "Myutant Expansion" per turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
